scripts.test: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const cp=require('child_process');const tmp='.tmp';fs.mkdirSync(tmp,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(tmp)){if(f.startsWith('mission-control-test.db')){fs.rmSync(path.join(tmp,f),{force:true});}}const r=cp.spawnSync('npx tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 src/**/*.test.ts',{stdio:'inherit',shell:true,env:{...process.env,NODE_ENV:'test',DATABASE_PATH:'.tmp/mission-control-test.db'}});if(r.error){console.error(r.error);process.exit(1);}process.exit(r.status??1);"
scripts.db:backup: sqlite3 mission-control.db 'PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE);' && cp mission-control.db mission-control.db.backup && echo 'Backed up to mission-control.db.backup'
scripts.db:restore: cp mission-control.db.backup mission-control.db && echo 'Restored from backup'
scripts.db:reset: rm -f mission-control.db mission-control.db-* && npm run db:seed
